options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -accuracy_effort
options.description: Specifies viagen effort to generate vias.

options.name: -add_pin_to_pin_via
options.description: Inserts vias to connect pins between cover macros

options.name: -align_merged_stack_via_metals
options.description: Aligns merged stack vias

options.name: -allow_via_expansion
options.description: Allows via expansion to meet LEF rules

options.name: -allow_wire_shape_change
options.description: Allows via to change the metal shape of existing wire

options.name: -area_only
options.description: adds via only within the specified area

options.name: -bot_enclosure
options.description: Customize bot enclosure

options.name: -create_double_row_cut_via
options.description: Expands vias to have an additional cut than original for one-row or one-column vias if possible

options.name: -create_max_row_cut_via
options.description: Creates max rows of via cuts

options.name: -cut_spacing
options.description: Customize cut spacing

options.name: -cutclass_preference
options.description: Specifies via cut class preference

options.name: -disable_via_merging
options.description: Disables via merging

options.name: -extend_out_wire_end
options.description: Extends via outside of existing wires end

options.name: -full_cut_via_only
options.description: allows to create full cut via only

options.name: -genvia_naming_prefix
options.description: Specifies prefix name for all vias

options.name: -hookup_contact_max
options.description: Sets the max distance to create hookup via from contact, and the max distance between two hookup via on a continuous M0 PG pin.

options.name: -hookup_contact_pg_track
options.description: Sets start point and the pitch of PG track used by hookup contact.

options.name: -hookup_preplace_fix
options.description: Enhance hookup via generation runtime

options.name: -hookup_rail_pair
options.description: Create hookup vias over pairing followpins

options.name: -hookup_via_distance
options.description: Sets via hookup distance and boundary spacing

options.name: -hookup_via_fixed_grid
options.description: Specifies to add hookup via over the fixed Grid.

options.name: -hookup_via_min_distance
options.description: min distance between two pg vias

options.name: -hookup_via_style
options.description: Sets via hookup style

options.name: -hookup_via_viarule
options.description: Specifies the viarule used in specified area

options.name: -hookup_virtual_trim_grid
options.description: Specifies the virtual trim grid for pg hookup

options.name: -ignore_design_boundary
options.description: Allow vias to be on design boundary

options.name: -ignore_DRC
options.description: Ignores DRC

options.name: -ignore_viarule_enclosure
options.description: Ignores enclosures defined in VIARULE GENERATE

options.name: -inherit_wire_status
options.description: Inherits wire status

options.name: -invoke_verifyGeometry
options.description: Invokes verify_drc

options.name: -keep_existing_via
options.description: Keeps existing vias

options.name: -keep_fixed_via
options.description: Keeps fixed vias not modifiable

options.name: -mincut_preference
options.description: Specifies min cut preference

options.name: -optimize_cross_via
options.description: Controls the creation of additional via cuts

options.name: -optimize_via_on_routing_track
options.description: Frees up via tracks

options.name: -parameterized_via_only
options.description: generate parameterized vias only, auto sets true for OA flow, false for non-OA flow.

options.name: -partial_overlap_threshold
options.description: Specifies ratio threshold of via creation on partial overlap wires

options.name: -preferred_vias_only
options.description: Generate only vias set in -viarule_preference

options.name: -reference_boundary
options.description: Sets reference boundary

options.name: -respect_signal_routes
options.description: Honors pre-existing signal routes

options.name: -respect_stdcell_geometry
options.description: Respects all standard cell patterns

options.name: -respect_wire_ndr
options.description: Control whether viagen support ndr rules

options.name: -set_via_expansion_dir
options.description: Sets via expansion direction

options.name: -snap_via_center_to_grid
options.description: Specifies the via center alignment style per routing layer

options.name: -split_long_via_global_grid
options.description: Controls global grids so vias on them are in line

options.name: -symmetrical_via_only
options.description: adds symmetrical via only, auto sets true for OA flow, false for non-OA flow.

options.name: -top_enclosure
options.description: Customize top enclosure

options.name: -use_track_offset
options.description: Uses track offset

options.name: -use_trim_metal_enclosure
options.description: Force tool to use enclosures with trim layer

options.name: -viarule_preference
options.description: Specifies via rule preference

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
